attribs.current:
Armor Class 12
Hit Points 25
Speed (water) 15 ft.

Move up to the ship's speed, with one 90-degree turn. Without oars, the ship does not move.

This is for small one man crafts like row boats and canoes.

attribs.current:
Armor Class 18
Hit Points 100; -20 ft. speed per 25 damage taken

Speed (air) 80 ft. If the engine is destroyed, the ship immediately begins crashing.

An air elemental is trapped within a magitek prison. Its essence and force redirected to keep the ship aloft. If released.. probably not too happy.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjInuBgL2Haz00aJ5C3_description
attribs.current: Each movement upgrade applies to a specific movement type. A component can gain the benefits of one upgrade.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjInzIymdybZBGny7TG_description
attribs.current: Using a combination of magic and clockwork, the oars on this ship require only one crew member to use them, pushing the button or lever that activates them.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIo1gsSKLIuiYsCMMS_description
attribs.current: These billowing sails are woven from cloud-stuff drawn from the Elemental Plane of Air. Wind whips and whistles around them, allowing a ship to move with a speed of 60 feet regardless of direction relative to the wind.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIo8BT7ZZy4eFnknD0_description
attribs.current: These sails glitter with a fine coat of mithral treated with abjuration magic. While the sails are unfurled, ranged weapon attacks made against the ship and anyone aboard it are made with disadvantage, as a result of the sails’ protective magic. This drawback doesn’t apply if the attacker is aboard the ship.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIoBt398OC-Z0jKDnz_description
attribs.current:
Dragon scales woven into these sails make them more resistant to damage. The sails gain a +3 bonus to AC, and they have resistance to a damage type based on the type of scales used to craft them, as shown on the Dragon Sails table.

Dragon Sails
Dragon Type	Damage Type
Black	Acid
Blue	Lightning
Brass	Fire
Bronze	Lightning
Copper	Acid
Gold	Fire
Green	Acid
Red	Fire
Silver	Cold
White	Cold

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIoPqaAK3uk68Wmnll_description
attribs.current: Woven from the energy of captured wraiths and bound with the spirit of a banshee, these sails groan mournfully when they catch the wind. As an action, while within 5 feet of the sails, the ship’s captain can cause the sails to unleash a howl. Every creature hostile to the ship who is on board or within 300 feet of it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw, or the creature takes 4d6 psychic damage and is then frightened for 1 minute. Once this ability has been used, it can’t be used again until 2d6 hours have passed.

attribs.name: repeating_npctrait_-MjIoUL5xbEJvNZfjVbD_description
attribs.current: Sharpened, magically reinforced oars make a vessel dangerous to approach. When the ship takes an action that moves it with these oars, any creature or object in the water within 10 feet of it at any point of the move must make a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 slashing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

attribs.name: repeating_npcaction_-MjIulRsZy4rlMGlD99X_description
attribs.current:
Armor Class 12
Hit Points 100; -5 ft. speed per 20 damage taken

Speed (water) 30 ft.

The paddle wheel can be powered by steam or elemental creatures. Its greatest advantage is allowing large boats to go into shallow water. It can also use its movement speed to turn 180 degrees.
